summary: Backend testing for iteration 9 features - 23/23 tests passed (100%). Verified: GET /api/health healthy, GET /api/clients returns client list with name/email/phone/birth_date/source fields (barber auth required), PUT /api/auth/update-phone accepts both phone AND birth_date fields with validation, POST /api/public/book creates appointment and triggers notification, POST /api/whatsapp/setup saves API key, GET /api/whatsapp/settings returns correct structure, appointment action endpoints (confirm/cancel/complete) work and trigger notifications, all require proper authentication.

issues: Cannot test - web-client (Vite React app) is not deployed/served in this environment. Needs separate server on port 3001.

action_items: Web-client (Dashboard with profile modal) needs to be deployed/served to test frontend. Currently only Expo mobile app is running.
critical_code_review_comments: Clients endpoint (/api/clients) properly returns both registered users and appointment-derived clients
PUT /api/auth/update-phone correctly validates: phone >= 8 chars, birth_date in YYYY-MM-DD format
Notification service properly calls both push and WhatsApp notifications for appointment events
Web-client Dashboard.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for profile modal components
Mobile app clients.tsx shows name, email, phone, birth_date with search functionality

success_rate.frontend: Mobile app loads correctly, booking flow works. Web-client not testable (not served).

seed_data_creation: Created 4 test appointments with TEST_ prefix for confirm/cancel/complete action tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 9 features working in backend. GET /api/clients returns clients with name, email, phone, birth_date, source, total_appointments, last_appointment fields. PUT /api/auth/update-phone accepts phone AND/OR birth_date. Appointment actions (confirm/cancel/complete) trigger notifications via notification_service.py. Mobile app is Expo on port 3000. Web-client is Vite React on port 3001 but NOT deployed. Service ID 6 (Corte Rapido) valid for testing.

tested_features.GET /api/clients (barber auth): PASS - Returns list with correct client structure
tested_features.PUT /api/auth/update-phone (both): PASS - Updates both phone and birth_date
tested_features.PUT /api/auth/update-phone (invalid birt: PASS - Returns 400 for invalid date format
tested_features.POST /api/public/book: PASS - Creates appointment with status 'pending', returns BookingConfirmation
tested_features.POST /api/whatsapp/setup (with auth): PASS - Saves API key, returns message
tested_features.GET /api/whatsapp/settings (with auth): PASS - Returns {id, is_active, has_pat, wasender_session_id, connected}
tested_features.GET /api/auth/me: PASS - Returns user with phone field
tested_features.Mobile frontend: PASS - Loads correctly, public booking flow works, services displayed

mocked_apis_note: WaSenderAPI and Expo Push are real external services. Notifications attempted but won't send without valid keys/tokens. Endpoints work correctly with proper error handling.
